subject: Two Aether Foundation employees in matching white uniforms with white caps, one in the foreground walking toward the viewer and one behind, set against a tropical outdoor background
description: Two humanoid figures in identical white uniforms and white caps stride through a warm outdoor setting with tropical foliage visible behind them. The foreground figure faces slightly toward the viewer with a confident posture; the second figure is partially behind and to the right. The uniforms are clean and institutional — a recognizable corporate livery. The warm light and lush greenery give the scene a deceptively pleasant, professional quality that belies the organization's lore role.
foreground: Two uniformed humanoid figures in white
background: Tropical outdoor greenery, warm natural light
